description: Setting a Blob container's public access level to Blob/Container to share a file.
body: Failure mode: to share one blob, a container's public access is set to Blob or Container, exposing its contents to anonymous reads. Detection signals: container access level reports Blob/Container, anonymous GET succeeds, and Defender for Cloud flags public storage. Do not enable public container access for a one-off share. Safer fallback: keep the container Private, issue a short-lived user-delegation SAS for the specific blob, or front public assets with a CDN, and treat any genuine public-container need as human-gated.
